name: Soft Milk Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Milk chocolate bar, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Line two cookie sheets with parchment paper.
Sift together the sifted flours, cream of tartar, and salt in a bowl.
In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter and shortening on low speed for 5 minutes.
Add the sugars and beat on moderate speed for 3 minutes.
Beat in the egg and egg yolk. Stir in the vanilla extract and almond extract.
On low speed, add the sifted flour mixture to the bowl; mix until all flour is incorporated.
Stir in the milk chocolate, coconut flakes, and walnuts.
Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto lined cookie sheets, spacing about 2 to 2 1/2 inches apart. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Using a metal spatula, transfer cookies to cooling racks after baking for 1 minute. Cool completely on the racks before storing in an airtight container.
